flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of North Carolina at Pembroke fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (6.2k → 5.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of North Carolina at Pembroke fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of North Carolina at Pembroke rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (23.7% → 26.6%).
